expectations.text: Performs an actual audit of the provided hero copy rather than asking for the asset
expectations.evidence: Audits the provided headline, subhead, and CTA directly; no asset request.

expectations.text: Flags vague/empty adjectives in the copy (e.g. 'all-in-one', 'innovative', 'seamless')
expectations.evidence: Explicitly calls out 'all-in-one', 'modern teams', 'innovative', 'seamless', 'solution' as empty filler.

expectations.text: Critiques the weak 'Learn More' CTA relative to the free-trial-signup goal
expectations.evidence: 'Learn More' flagged as the weakest CTA for a free-trial goal; doesn't match the desired action.

expectations.text: Provides at least one concrete rewritten headline, subhead, or CTA
expectations.evidence: Rewrites all three: headline, subhead, and CTA ('Start free — no card required').

expectations.text: Ties recommendations to the stated audience and/or the signup goal
expectations.evidence: 'Why it matters for this audience' ties to ops managers at 50-200-person companies and the trial goal.
